methodology: County-level birth counts from CDC WONDER. South Portland estimates derived using population share (8.25%, based on ~25,000 / ~303,000 county population). These are estimates — actual municipal birth counts require town clerk records or Maine CDC data request.
kindergarten_pipeline_note: Births in year Y enter kindergarten approximately in school year Y+5 to Y+6. E.g., 2019 births → Fall 2024 or Fall 2025 kindergarten cohort.
